description: Core-plugin permissions shared by both webviews: `listen` for backend events plus the rest of `core:default`. Everything else (tray, global shortcut, autostart, notifications, window show/hide, update probes) is driven from Rust and needs no JS capability. The app's own `invoke` commands are NOT granted here — they are scoped per window in `palette.json` (main) and `settings.json` (settings) so a compromise of one webview cannot reach the other's command surface.
